name: beadwork-skills
description: Skills + plain-language guides for beadwork (bw — github.com/jallum/beadwork): help any AI explain what bw is and whether it fits — durable, private, git-native memory and agent-to-agent coordination for any work, not just code — plus an install skill that drives setup. The content (guides + AGENTS.md brief) is agent-agnostic; packaged here as Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: beadwork
plugins.description: Six thin, agent-agnostic skills that point at plain-language guides: beadwork-overview (introduce bw, judge fit), beadwork-as-memory (durable cross-session memory), beadwork-as-bus (multi-agent / team coordination), beadwork-for-meta-analysis (one agent auditing other agents' recorded work), beadwork-for-decisions (decision logs / audit trails), beadwork-install (drives setup end-to-end).
